name: Chapman Cocktail
intro: This bright orange drink is said to have originated from the exclusive Ikoyi Club in Lagos. I have fond memories of going to the club on weekends for tennis lessons and on the rare occasion that we’d dine there as a family after a lesson, I always enjoyed ordering the non-alcoholic version of the cocktail. Chapman is refreshing, flavourful and perfect for a hot, sunny day.

ingredients.item: grenadine syrup 1/2 cup blackcurrant juice concentrate (e.g. Ribena)

method: Place all the ingredients in a large pitcher and stir with a long spatula or wooden spoon. Serve chilled over ice.
